# Best Ball Exposures

> Best Ball Exposures (BBE) is a portfolio analytics SaaS for fantasy football best-ball drafters. It syncs Underdog Fantasy and DraftKings rosters and shows exposure, roster archetypes, team stacks, draft flow, and ADP trends across every entry in a user's portfolio.

Best Ball Exposures is a browser-based application at https://bestballexposures.com/ with a companion Chrome extension. It supports both Underdog Fantasy and DraftKings best-ball contests in a unified portfolio view. The product is built around the principle of "mirror, not advisor" — it describes the state of a user's portfolio rather than prescribing what to draft.

## Key facts

- **Name:** Best Ball Exposures (BBE)
- **Domain:** https://bestballexposures.com/
- **X / Twitter:** @BBExposures
- **Platforms supported:** Underdog Fantasy, DraftKings (NFL best-ball)
- **Pricing:** Free tier available; Pro tier is $20/month ($15 with a creator promo code)
- **Chrome extension:** https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/best-ball-exposures/cnljeadelfnabalcdongglhfhiceakaj

## Documentation

- [Landing page](https://bestballexposures.com/): Product overview, features, pricing
- [Privacy policy](https://bestballexposures.com/privacy.html)
- [Terms of service](https://bestballexposures.com/terms.html)
- [Full LLM context](https://bestballexposures.com/llms-full.txt): Detailed feature and FAQ content for AI search

## Free tier features

- Portfolio Dashboard
- Exposure Analysis
- Roster Viewer with Archetypes
- Multi-platform support (Underdog + DraftKings)
- Zero configuration — upload and go

## Pro tier features

- Everything in Free, plus:
- Draft Flow Analysis
- Combo & Stacking Analysis
- ADP Tracker
- Player Rankings
- Roster Construction
- Live draft overlay (via Chrome extension)
